tutorial_story_prologue_1: One day, you were walking down the street
tutorial_story_prologue_3: The cat gave you a special game and said:
tutorial_story_prologue_4: "There are many sad street cats in the fairy world.
tutorial_story_prologue_5: You can summon them with this game."
tutorial_story_mission_1: 1. 💫 Summon sad cats with the game
tutorial_story_mission_2: 2. 🌱 Take good care of them with love
tutorial_story_mission_3: 3. 🌈 Send healthy cats back to the fairy world
tutorial_story_mission_4: 4. ⭐ Collect 100 Legendary cats to save the fairy world
tutorial_story_why_1: The cats came from the fairy world,
tutorial_story_why_2: but fell to Earth because they were sad. 😿
tutorial_story_why_3: When you love and care for them,
tutorial_story_why_4: they can go back to the fairy world and be happy! 🏡✨
tutorial_story_why_5: And when you collect Legendary cats,
tutorial_story_why_6: you can calm down the naughty cats
tutorial_story_why_7: and bring peace to the fairy world. 🌟
tutorial_home_content: 🏠 Welcome to the Cat Fairy Club! Tap each button to play with the cats ✨
tutorial_home_bullet_1: 🎰 Gacha: Meet new cats (5 free tries per day!)
tutorial_home_bullet_2: 📦 Collection: Take care of your cats
tutorial_home_bullet_3: 🌟 Return: Send cats back to the fairy world
tutorial_home_bullet_4: ⚔️ Battle: Battle with friends and your cats
tutorial_home_bullet_5: 🪄 Magic Wand: Play a card game with cat cards
tutorial_home_bullet_6: 🗺️ Search: Find fairy cats near you
tutorial_gacha_content: 🎰 Spin the gacha to meet new cats! Tap "Spin Gacha" button (5 free tries per day!) 🎁
tutorial_gacha_bullet_1: Rarity: C(gray) → UC(green) → R(blue) → SR(red) → UR(gold) → LG(purple)
tutorial_gacha_bullet_3: Ticket System: You get 5 free tickets every night at midnight ⏰
tutorial_gacha_bullet_4: Result: Your new cat goes to the Main Pool 📦
tutorial_gacha_hint: 💡 Tip: Tap a cat card to see more details
tutorial_collection_content: 📦 This is where you take care of all your cats! You can drag cats to move them between pools 🔄
tutorial_collection_bullet_1: 🍽️ Feed All: Give food to all cats at once (Friendship +5, Happiness +5, Energy +20)
tutorial_collection_bullet_2: 🏠 Move Pools: Press and drag a cat to move it
tutorial_collection_bullet_3: Main Pool (200 cats): Where cats live together
tutorial_collection_bullet_4: Battle Pool (3 cats): Cats for battles
tutorial_collection_bullet_5: Reward Pool (30 cats): Cats you caught in battles
tutorial_collection_bullet_6: Adoption Pool (20 cats): Cats ready to say goodbye
tutorial_collection_bullet_7: 🐱 Get magic power when you adopt cats (C:10 / UC:20 / R:50 / SR:100 / UR:200 / LG:500)
tutorial_collection_hint:
💡 Tip 1: Tap a cat to go to the care screen
💡 Tip 2: If you have many cats, use the Feed All button
💡 Tip 3: Legendary (LG) cats ask you before adoption!
💡 Tip 4: Cats in Adoption Pool leave after 2 days 👋
tutorial_care_content: 💕 When you take care of cats, their friendship and happiness go up! Tap the buttons below to care for your cat 🐱
tutorial_care_bullet_6: ⏰ You can do each action once every 24 hours!
tutorial_care_bullet_7: 💖 Friendship: How much the cat loves you
tutorial_care_bullet_8: 😊 Happiness: How happy the cat feels
tutorial_care_bullet_9: ⚡ Energy: How active the cat is
tutorial_care_bullet_10: 📉 All stats go down a little every night at midnight (Rarer cats go down slower!)
tutorial_care_hint: 💡 Tip: When all stats are 100, your cat is "Perfect" and shows up in rankings!
tutorial_return_content: 🌟 Send 2 or more cats of the same rarity (with Friendship, Happiness, and Energy all 90+) to summon a higher rarity cat! Select cats and tap "Return to Fairy World" ✨
tutorial_return_bullet_1: 🎲 Chance to summon a higher rarity cat: 2 cats(40%) / 3 cats(60%) / 4 cats(80%) / 5 cats(100% guaranteed!)
tutorial_return_bullet_2: 💰 Don't worry if you fail! You get magic power (C:20 / UC:80 / R:200 / SR:400 / UR:600)
tutorial_return_bullet_3: 📋 How to select cats: 1. Tap a rarity tab → 2. Select 2~5 cats → 3. Check success chance → 4. Tap "Return to Fairy World"!
tutorial_return_hint:
💡 Tip 1: 5 cats = 100% success!
💡 Tip 2: Higher rarity cats are harder to collect, so think carefully!
💡 Tip 3: Selected cats disappear whether you succeed or fail
tutorial_battle_setup_content: ⚔️ Choose 3 cats for battle! Tap cats in your Battle Pool (exactly 3 cats!) 🐱🐱🐱
tutorial_battle_setup_bullet_1: 🎯 Battle cat tips: Choose scissors/rock/paper evenly
tutorial_battle_setup_bullet_3: Higher rarity cats have special effects!
tutorial_battle_setup_bullet_4: 💪 Cat types: ✂️ Scissors / 🪨 Rock / 📄 Paper (game attribute)
tutorial_battle_setup_bullet_5: 🗡️ Items: Attack, defense, dodge, and heal effects
tutorial_battle_setup_bullet_6: 🛡️ Possessions: Attack, defense, dodge, and heal effects
tutorial_battle_setup_hint:
💡 Tip 1: If your Battle Pool is empty, move cats from Collection screen!
💡 Tip 2: Tap cat cards to see details
💡 Tip 3: When you select 3 cats, the "Go to Battle Lobby" button appears
tutorial_battle_lobby_content: 🏟️ Create or join a room to battle with friends! When you create a room, you get a 6-digit code 📱
tutorial_battle_lobby_bullet_1: 🎮 Way 1️⃣ - Create Room: 1. Tap "Create Room" → 2. Give the 6-digit code to your friend → 3. Wait for friend to join
tutorial_battle_lobby_bullet_2: 🎮 Way 2️⃣ - Join Room: 1. Enter code from friend → 2. Tap "Join Room" → 3. Game starts!
tutorial_battle_lobby_bullet_3: 🎮 Way 3️⃣ - Quick Join: 1. Tap a waiting room → 2. Game starts!
tutorial_battle_lobby_bullet_4: 📋 Room info: 👤 Host name, 🔢 Room code, ⏰ Created time (auto-deleted after 30 min)
tutorial_battle_lobby_hint:
💡 Tip 1: You can only make 1 room at a time. You can't join your own room
💡 Tip 2: The host sees a "⚔️" icon on the home screen when a friend joins
💡 Tip 3: Rooms disappear if no game starts for 30 minutes
tutorial_battle_game_content: ⚔️ Pick 1 cat in 10 seconds! Play rock-paper-scissors ✂️🪨📄
tutorial_battle_game_bullet_1: 🎯 Battle rules: ✂️ Scissors beats 📄 Paper / 🪨 Rock beats ✂️ Scissors / 📄 Paper beats 🪨 Rock
tutorial_battle_game_bullet_2: 💥 Basic damage: 30 / 🛡️ Starting HP: 120 (you lose when it reaches 0!)
tutorial_battle_game_bullet_3: ⏱️ Pick time: 10 seconds (time out = random pick)
tutorial_battle_game_bullet_4: 🎁 Item effects: Attack, defense, dodge, and heal
tutorial_battle_game_bullet_5: 🛡️ Possession effects: Attack, defense, dodge, and heal
tutorial_battle_game_bullet_6: 📊 Damage calculation: Basic damage → Item/Possession bonus → Final HP
tutorial_battle_game_bullet_7: 📺 Round result screen: Which cats fought, rock-paper-scissors result, effects, HP change (auto next round after 5 sec)
tutorial_battle_game_hint:
💡 Tip 1: Use effects well to turn the battle around!
💡 Tip 2: Remember which cats your opponent uses often
💡 Tip 3: Some effects work even on ties
tutorial_battle_result_content: 🏆 The battle is over! Check your rewards!
tutorial_battle_result_bullet_1: 🎁 Win rewards: ⭐ 50 EXP (level up!), 💰 200 magic power
tutorial_battle_result_bullet_2: 🐱 Copy opponent cat chance: C(100%) / UC(50%) / R(25%) / SR(12%) / UR(6%) / LG(3%)
tutorial_battle_result_bullet_3: 💪 Lose rewards: ⭐ 50 EXP, 💰 100 magic power (you get rewards even if you lose!)
tutorial_battle_result_bullet_5: 🎲 What is copy cat? A chance to copy (capture) the losing cat! If you succeed, it goes to Reward Pool
tutorial_battle_result_hint:
💡 Tip 1: Battle records reset every month
💡 Tip 2: Check this month's win rate in Rankings
💡 Tip 3: Your Battle Pool cats stay after the game
tutorial_gostop_lobby_content: 🐱 Magic Wand Collection! (Cat card game) Play cards with friends and bet magic power 🎲
tutorial_gostop_lobby_bullet_1: 🐱 What is Magic Wand Collection? A 2-player game with 48 cat cards. Collect matching cat cards to get points
tutorial_gostop_lobby_bullet_2: When you get 3 points, choose "Go" or "Stop"! Win and take your opponent's magic power 💰
tutorial_gostop_lobby_bullet_4: 🎮 Way 1️⃣ - Create Room: 1. Tap "Create Room" → 2. Give 6-digit code to friend → 3. Wait for friend
tutorial_gostop_lobby_bullet_5: 🎮 Way 2️⃣ - Join Room: 1. Enter code or tap room in list → 2. Game starts!
tutorial_gostop_lobby_hint:
💡 Tip 1: Try practice mode first to learn the rules
💡 Tip 2: Don't worry if you don't know! We'll teach you during the game
💡 Tip 3: You can only make 1 room at a time
tutorial_gostop_game_content: 🐱 Match cat cards with the same background and shape to get points! Double-click a card → auto-match floor cards → auto-draw 1 card → auto-match floor cards ✨
tutorial_gostop_game_bullet_1: 🎯 How to play: Step 1: Pick a card from your hand → Step 2: Match with same background on floor (or add to floor if no match) → Step 3: Auto-draw 1 card → Step 4: Auto-match with floor if same background! (💡 Hover over any card to make it bigger!)
tutorial_gostop_game_bullet_2: 🐱 5 types of cat cards: ⭐ Magic Wand (bright): Special cats with magic wands! / 🎀 Pretty (ribbon): Cute ribbon and eye patch cards / 🎨 Cool (ten): Bandana, scouter, goggles, bell collar cards / 🌸 Feeling (plain): Happy or angry cat cards
tutorial_gostop_game_bullet_3: 📊 Points: ⭐ Magic Wand(3 cards=3 points, 5 cards=15 points!) / 🎀 Pretty(1 point from 5 cards, 3 points if you collect all same type!) / 🎨 Cool(1 point from 5 cards, 5 points if you collect all bandanas!) / 🌸 Feeling(1 point from 10 cards, moon and candy cats count as 2)
tutorial_gostop_game_bullet_4: 🎲 What is Go/Stop? You can choose when you have 3+ points! 📛 Stop: End game and win / 🔄 Go: Keep playing (1 go=2x, 2 go=4x, 3 go=8x, 4 go=16x) ⚠️ Warning: If you call Go and opponent comes back, you lose! Choose carefully!
tutorial_gostop_game_bullet_5: 🌟 Special combos (bonus points): 🌈 5 Magic Wands(+15 points) / ✨ 4 Magic Wands(+4 points, except playground kidnapper cube wand) / 💫 3 Magic Wands(+3 points, except playground kidnapper cube wand) / 🦜 Bandana(3 bandana cool cats, +5 points) / 🔴 Red Ribbon(3 red ribbon pretty cats, +3 points) / 🔵 Pink Ribbon(3 pink ribbon pretty cats, +3 points) / 🟡 Cute Eyepatch(3 cute eyepatch pretty cats, +3 points)
tutorial_gostop_game_bullet_6: 💰 Magic power: Points × 20 × Multiplier (Examples: 3 points with stop=60 magic power, 5 points with 1 go=200 magic power, 7 points with 2 go=560 magic power) 🎯 High score tip: Try to get many combos at once!
tutorial_gostop_game_hint:
💡 Tip 1: Auto-draw when your hand is empty
💡 Tip 2: Your collected cards are sorted above your hand. Click to see them.
💡 Tip 3: Check what your opponent took! Click the collected cards at the top of the screen.
💡 Tip 4: Game auto-ends when deck is empty
💡 Tip 5: Watch out for moon and candy cats (count as 2 feeling cards)! Opponent can take them
tutorial_exploration_content: 🗺️ Find cats on the map! Cat markers appear near your location 📍
tutorial_exploration_bullet_1: 🗺️ How to use map: 🖱️ Drag(move map), 🔍 Pinch/Scroll(zoom in/out), 📍 Blue dot(your location), 🐱 Cat markers(cats you found)
tutorial_exploration_bullet_2: ✨ How to summon cats: 1️⃣ Check magic power(PC:250, Mobile:200) → 2️⃣ Tap "Summon Cats" → 3️⃣ Cat markers appear on map!(PC:2~3 cats, Mobile:1~3 cats) → 4️⃣ Click marker to collect(PC:just click, Mobile:walk within 10m)
tutorial_exploration_bullet_3: 🎨 Marker colors: ⚫ C(gray-common) / 🟢 UC(green-uncommon) / 🔵 R(blue-rare) / 🔴 SR(red-super rare) / 🟡 UR(gold-ultra rare) / 🟣 LG(purple-legendary!)
tutorial_exploration_hint:
💡 Tip 1: Allow GPS permission to see your exact location
💡 Tip 2: Cats you find on the map go to Main Pool automatically
💡 Tip 3: If you need magic power, get it from battles or adoption!
💡 Tip 4: On mobile, you need to actually walk 🏃
tutorial_profile_content: 👤 Check your information and records here! Tap your nickname to change it ✏️
tutorial_profile_bullet_1: 📊 Basic info: 👤 Nickname(name others see), ⭐ Level(goes up with EXP), 💰 Magic power(for search and trades), 🎟️ Gacha tickets(5 tickets every day)
tutorial_profile_bullet_2: 📊 Collection stats: 📦 Total cats(all your cats), 💯 Perfect cats(stats 100/100/100)
tutorial_profile_bullet_3: 📊 Battle stats (this month): ⚔️ Total battles(battles this month), 🏆 Wins(how many you won), 💪 Win rate(wins / total battles)
tutorial_profile_bullet_4: ✏️ How to change nickname: 1. Tap nickname → 2. Enter new name (2~50 characters) → 3. Tap "Save"
tutorial_profile_hint:
💡 Tip 1: Battle to level up
💡 Tip 2: Join date is saved automatically
💡 Tip 3: Stats reset on the 1st of every month
tutorial_ranking_content: 🏆 Show off your best records! Tap tabs to see other rankings 🎯
tutorial_ranking_bullet_1: 📊 4 rankings: 🌟 Collection ranking(rarest cats, higher rarity score = higher rank!) / 💕 Care ranking(perfect cat count, more perfect cats = higher rank!) / ⚔️ Battle ranking(this month's win rate, more wins and higher rate = higher rank!) / 💰 Magic power ranking(magic power count, more power = higher rank!)
tutorial_ranking_bullet_2: 🎖️ Ranking rules: Shows top 20, resets on 1st of month at midnight (except collection/care), top 3 get medals(🥇 1st / 🥈 2nd / 🥉 3rd)
tutorial_ranking_bullet_3: 📱 Your rank: Shows if you're in top 20. Not in rankings yet? Keep playing!
tutorial_ranking_hint:
💡 Tip 1: Pull down to refresh!
💡 Tip 2: Try to get 1st place in each category
💡 Tip 3: Collection and care keep building up
💡 Tip 4: Battle and magic power compete every month!

provider_gacha_tip_evolution: Try evolution with 2 cats of the same rarity!
